{{CargoRelic
|name=Mnar’s Starstone
|class_id=21748
|rank=AAA
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=Anti-Lovecraftian compass. Spinning basalt pentagrams that repel deep ones but warp vision.
|fame=35
|art=50
|fth=75
|civ=41
|tech=42
|ss1=Minion Recovery SPD +1.5%<br>prop@52443_2
|ss2=Minion Recovery SPD +2%<br>prop@52443_2
|ss3=Minion Recovery SPD +2.5%<br>prop@52443_2
|ss4=Minion Recovery SPD +3.5%<br>prop@52443_2
|ss5=Minion Recovery SPD +4.5%<br>prop@52443_2
|ss7=Minion Recovery SPD +4.5%<br>prop@52443_2<br>prop@52443_2 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Swampsanctum skill II.png|50px]]Place in Swamp Sanctum: This Relic's FTH +10
|skill2=[[File:Swampsanctum skill II.png|50px]]Place in Swamp Sanctum: Swamp Sanctum, Glorium Cap +15%
}}
